══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Owlin — Armored Tank --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:18+4=22 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Owlin — Armored Tank (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Owlin — Armored Tank
→ Bite: [d20:7+10=17 vs AC 20] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:8+10=18 vs AC 20] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:1+10=11 vs AC 20] MISS.
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Owlin — Armored Tank --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Young Red Dragon (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:18+4=22 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Owlin — Armored Tank (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Owlin — Armored Tank
→ Bite: [d20:11+10=21 vs AC 20] HIT! 15 damage. Owlin — Armored Tank HP: 44/59
→ Bite: [d20:2+10=12 vs AC 20] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:15+10=25 vs AC 20] HIT! 13 damage. Owlin — Armored Tank HP: 31/59
══ ROUND 3 ══
--- Owlin — Armored Tank --- HP: 31/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Young Red Dragon (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 1 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:3+4=7 vs DC 15] FAIL!
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:3+4=7 vs DC 15] FAIL. Still paralyzed.
══ ROUND 4 ══
--- Owlin — Armored Tank --- HP: 31/59 | AC: 20 | Conc: Hold Person
REASONING: All 1 enemies disabled by Hold Person. Dodging to maintain concentration.
ACTION: Dodge. Attacks against have disadvantage.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:12+4=16 vs DC 15] SUCCESS! No longer paralyzed!
══ ROUND 5 ══
--- Owlin — Armored Tank --- HP: 31/59 | AC: 20 | Conc: Hold Person
REASONING: Concentrating on Hold Person. Vicious Mockery on Young Red Dragon (disadvantage protects concentration).
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 15 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:15+4=19 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Owlin — Armored Tank (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Owlin — Armored Tank
→ Bite: [d20:18+10=28 vs AC 20] HIT! 19 damage. Owlin — Armored Tank HP: 12/59
→ Concentration save: [d20(ADV):14+4=18 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
→ Bite: [d20:13+10=23 vs AC 20] HIT! 15 damage. Owlin — Armored Tank HP: -3/59
→ Concentration save: [d20(ADV):8+4=12 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
